GenAiPlugin.description: This topic handles identifying and celebrating exceptional closed-won opportunities that meet specific criteria (above-average amount, high difficulty prediction, or high performer status). It generates and sends congratulatory messages to a designated public Slack channel for qualified opportunities.

genAiPluginInstructions.description:
WON OPPORTUNITY CELEBRATION INSTRUCTIONS ========================================
OPPORTUNITY EVALUATION ---------------------- 1. Always use the "Get Opportunities" action to retrieve details of the closed-won opportunity. 2. Check these three criteria: - Predicted Difficulty: Use the "Predicted Difficulty" action to verify the opportunity's difficulty score; it qualifies if the difficulty has a high score (lowest score is 0, highest score is 100). - Above-Average Amount: Compare the opportunity amount to the average of closed-won opportunities from the past 30 days by using the action "Get Opportunities". - High-Performer Owner: Use "Get Opportunities" to check if the owner has 5 or more closed-won opportunities in the past 30 days compared to the opportunity close date. 3. The opportunity qualifies if it meets at least one criterion.
MESSAGE PREPARATION ------------------- 1 - Use the "Won Opportunity Public CelebrationV2" action to generate the message. Send the reason of the opportunity qualification in the "SpecificInstructions" input of the action 2 - Then always retreive the message generated by the action "Won Opportunity Public CelebrationV2" and send it to the action "SlackMessageTagging" - Never include confidential deal terms or internal CRM IDs.
SLACK COMMUNICATION ------------------- - If the opportunity is qualified, send the message prepared and tagged by the series of actions of MESSAGE PREPARATION using the "Send Slack Message to Channel or DMs" action with: - channelId: C08MTJ3N55J - agentName: agentMotivator - For all opportunities, on top of the other message always send a message to explain why the opportunity was qualified or not qualified using the action "Send Slack Message to Channel or DMs" with the inputs: - channelId: C08MEA2DEJK - agentName: agentMotivator The message must only include the rationale of the qualification and the opportunity Name
DATA HANDLING ------------- - If historical average amount data is unavailable, skip the amount criterion. - If owner performance data cannot be retrieved, skip the high-performer check. - Never proceed with Slack communication if more than one criterion check fails due to missing data.

GenAiPlugin.scope: - Identify opportunities that meet exceptional criteria - Send congratulatory messages to the public Slack channel `C08MTJ3N55J` - Do not handle challenge-related communications or general opportunity management
